scripts.build: npm run localize:build && npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @rin-labs/tokens && npm run build --workspace @rin-labs/themes && npm run build --workspace @rin-labs/ui
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @rin-labs/tokens && npm run test --workspace @rin-labs/ui
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run build && npm run manifest && npm run test:browser
